Quality Education.reason: The course is fundamentally about improving teaching quality, a core concept of SDG 4. It aims to '增進教學專業知識' (enhance professional teaching knowledge) for future teachers (Target 4.c).
evidence: 開課單位：師資培一、師資培二、師資培三

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for a specific profession (teaching), contributing to decent work (Target 8.5) by fostering '不斷追求專業成長的理念與意向' (continuously pursuing professional growth).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: A minimal inferred link to innovation (Target 9.5) through discussion of '較新的教學模式或策略' (newer teaching models or strategies) within the education sector.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course promotes equal opportunity (Target 10.3) in education by teaching how to '尊重學習者的發展與學習需求' (respect learners' developmental and learning needs) and provide '適性輔導' (adaptive guidance).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Inferred link to building peaceful micro-institutions (classrooms) through '教室管理' (Classroom management) and '教師專業倫理' (professional ethics for teachers), relating to Target 16.6 at a local level.
